creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Created attachment 182098
tools/tools/umastat: unbreak build after r296243/b8acb1ed4aa which removed UMA_ZONE_REFCNT

r296243/b8acb1ed4aa broke the build of tools/tools/umastat which
still references UMA_ZONE_REFCNT.

The attached patch fixes this.

Obtained from: ElectroBSD
